source_material.title: Bad scanned survey source
source_material.body: This fixture intentionally simulates a layout-heavy or scanned PDF with too little extractable local text for professional intake.

expected_research_intake.research_context: Professional intake attempted from a layout-heavy or scanned document.
expected_research_intake.target_population_summary: Unknown because source extraction is insufficient.
expected_analyses: Professional intake must stop until Gemini or manual structured intake is supplied.
unresolved_gaps: Target population, source sample size, segmentation, and questionnaire rationale are not reliably extractable locally.

objectives: Prove bad professional input is rejected until the source is structured.
decision_questions: Can the document support professional study planning without external OCR or manual intake?
assumptions: Low-confidence local extraction is insufficient for professional reporting.
chart_plan: Suppress all charts until professional intake succeeds.

expected_question_rationales.rationale: Detects whether the source document is usable for professional intake.

expected_segmentation_behavior.minimum_base_rule: Do not report subgroup cuts until intake is repaired.

expected_report_warnings: Professional PDF intake requires Gemini document understanding or manual structured intake when local text extraction confidence is low.
expected_human_fieldwork_handoff: Do not field this survey until the source has been OCRed or manually structured.
Resolve target population, sample size, segmentation, and questionnaire rationale before professional reporting.
